languages.text: "Довериться тебе было ошибкой". {n}Аристократка прищуривается. Она выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и через секунду острая боль пронзает ваше тело.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Довериться тебе было ошибкой". {n}Аристократка прищуривается. Она выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и через секунду острая боль пронзает ваше тело.{/n}

languages.text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Довериться тебе было ошибкой". {n}Аристократка прищуривается. Она выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и через секунду острая боль пронзает ваше тело.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}
"It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}
"It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

languages.text: “信任你是个错误。”{n}尤文娜眯起眼睛，从枪套中抽出毒针手枪。下一秒，一阵剧痛贯穿了你的身体。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “信任你是个错误。”{n}尤文娜眯起眼睛，从枪套中抽出毒针手枪。下一秒，一阵剧痛贯穿了你的身体。{/n}

languages.text: « J'ai eu tort de vous faire confiance. » {n}Juvenna plisse les yeux, puis elle sort un pistolet à aiguilles de son étui. Un instant plus tard, une douleur vive transperce votre corps.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai eu tort de vous faire confiance. » {n}Juvenna plisse les yeux, puis elle sort un pistolet à aiguilles de son étui. Un instant plus tard, une douleur vive transperce votre corps.{/n}

languages.text: "Size güvenmek hataydı." {n}Juvenna gözlerini kısıyor. Kılıfından iğne tabancasını çekiyor. Bir saniye sonra vücuduna keskin bir acının saplandığnı hissediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Size güvenmek hataydı." {n}Juvenna gözlerini kısıyor. Kılıfından iğne tabancasını çekiyor. Bir saniye sonra vücuduna keskin bir acının saplandığnı hissediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: «Fue un error confiar en usted». {n}Juvenna entrecierra los ojos. Desenfunda una pistola de agujas y, un segundo después, un dolor agudo atraviesa tu cuerpo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Fue un error confiar en usted». {n}Juvenna entrecierra los ojos. Desenfunda una pistola de agujas y, un segundo después, un dolor agudo atraviesa tu cuerpo.{/n}

languages.text: "Es war ein Fehler, Euch zu vertrauen." {n}Juvenna kneift ihre Augen zusammen. Sie zieht eine Nadelpistole aus ihrem Holster und eine Sekunde später durchfährt ein stechender Schmerz deinen Körper.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It was a mistake to trust you." {n}Juvenna narrows her eyes. She pulls a needle pistol from its holster and, a second later, a sharp pain pierces your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Es war ein Fehler, Euch zu vertrauen." {n}Juvenna kneift ihre Augen zusammen. Sie zieht eine Nadelpistole aus ihrem Holster und eine Sekunde später durchfährt ein stechender Schmerz deinen Körper.{/n}

languages.text: 「君を信用したのは間違いだった」{n}ジュベナは目を細めた。そして、銃を抜き、一瞬の間に鋭い痛みを体中に感じてしまう。{/n}
